description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and clean lines. The structure is primarily white with some gray and red accents, and it is set adjacent to a wide, dark roadway with marked lanes. The front of the house includes a small entryway with steps, a covered porch area, and a landscaped section with greenery and a tree. Large windows are visible on the main facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a driveway and what appears to be a garage or carport on one side. The overall layout is compact, with a focus on functional outdoor space and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white and gray exterior, large windows, and a landscaped entryway next to a wide road. The design is boxy and minimalistic, featuring a driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the house's proximity to the road.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and landscaped area with greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the full width of the adjacent road.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard and the house's rectangular footprint.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on the main facade
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with steps, a covered porch, and minimalistic landscaping
